title: Ubiquiti USL-Environmental
description: Battery-powered SuperLink sensor that detects water leaks, temperature, humidity, and ambient light. For water leak detection, it is equipped with integrated sensors or an optional probe can be connected via the 3.5 mm AUX jack Connection via proprietary SuperLink wireless protocol 3.5 mm AUX jack for connecting a probe to monitor water leaks Powered by CR123A battery Battery life up to 6 years Mounting options: adhesive tape, magnet, or screws Device Battery CR123A Mounting accessories Mounting plate Caps
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency SuperLink Power Power type Battery
